The engineer explains that accurate measurements are crucial for creating a functional and safe living space. * * *  
The length of the room is twice the width, so if the width is x, the length is 2x. * * *  
The perimeter of the room is 36 meters, which equals 2*(length + width). * * *  
The engineer calculates the dimensions using the formula for perimeter: 2*(2x + x) = 36. * * *  
The solution shows that the width is 12 meters and the length is 24 meters. * * *  
The final dimensions of the room are 12 meters by 24 meters. * * *  
The engineer emphasizes that precision in measurements ensures the room meets the desired specifications. * * *
